text.title: AI-Assisted Accessibility Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing how the methodology produces a report artefact from the input through every rule + procedure step.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Quarterly audit example traced in `content/05-examples.xml`: 48 pages → axe+pa11y produce 312 violations → Haiku filters to 134 → Sonnet proposes 84 fixes → expert validates 71 → tickets in backlog.
